javascriptCode: if (window.ytInitialPlayerResponse) { const formats = window.ytInitialPlayerResponse.streamingData.adaptiveFormats; window.flutter_inappwebview.callHandler('onMediaFound', JSON.stringify(formats.map(f => ({url: f.url, type: 'youtube_adaptive', quality: f.qualityLabel})))); }

const playerConfig = window.config || window.playerConfig; if(playerConfig && playerConfig.source) { window.flutter_inappwebview.callHandler('onMediaFound', JSON.stringify([{url: playerConfig.source, type: 'hls'}])); }
